app.title: Navigator Digital Transformation
app.subtitle: Self-reflection for schools in digital transformation

compass.title: Explore the Compass
compass.description: Choose a topic that interests you. There is no right order — follow your curiosity.

chat.welcome: Welcome to the Navigator for Digital Transformation
chat.intro: This Navigator supports you and your team in reflecting on digital transformation at your school. There are no right or wrong answers — only your perspective matters.
chat.disclaimer: The Navigator does not judge — it provokes reflection.

topic.connected: Connected topics — where would you like to go next?

pulse.resultDesc: Based on your responses, this topic might be a good starting point for deeper reflection:

barriers.title: What's holding you back?
barriers.description: Instead of walking through the compass linearly, explore the barriers. At which level do you suspect the biggest obstacles?
barriers.teacherLevelDesc: Skills, mindsets, insecurity, lack of time
barriers.schoolLevelDesc: Missing vision, weak leadership, no structures, limited cooperation
barriers.systemLevelDesc: Infrastructure, funding, legal framework, external support
barriers.visionPrompt: Imagine your school in 3 years. What would the ideal use of digital media look like?
barriers.suggestedDesc: Based on your vision, these topics might be relevant. Select the barriers you'd like to explore further.
barriers.pickOne: Where would you like to start?
barriers.branchDesc: Three possible directions — pick what interests you most right now.
barriers.summaryError: The summary could not be generated.
